Back ACBA Leasing Close Main » Individuals » Get a loan » Collateral consumer loans » Consumer Loans, Secured with Deposit Consumer Loans, Secured with Deposit A consumer loan, secured with a deposit is a convenient way to solve your money problems by preserving your deposit accounts. Product's business card Currency AMD Minimum amount 50,000 AMD Maximum amount More » Maximum amount - 95% of the pledged amount, if the pledged funds are in AMD, - 90% of the pledged amount, if the pledged funds are in foreign currency. Duration 1-60 months Surety pledged deposit Advantages Terms and conditions To receive a loan Useful information Important to know Consumer loans, secured with a deposit are provided: Without the approval of the credit committee, Also to non-resident individuals, The loan is registered within a few minutes during the working hours via acba digital, In case of receiving via acba digital , the lowest interest rate. Providing a loan, secured with a deposit, the pledged deposit is not terminated, and an interest continues to be accrued against the deposit. Minimum amount - 50,000 AMD Maximum amount: 95% of the pledged amount, if the pledged funds are in AMD, 90% of the pledged amount, if the pledged funds are in foreign currency. Annual nominal interest rate: In case of loans up to 36 months (inclusive), the interest rate of "Classic" deposit with the corresponding loan term, + 5%, via acba digital + 4%, In case of loans with a maturity of 37 months and more than, the rate for the term of 24-36 months (inclusive) of "Classic" deposit, + 6%, via acba digital + 5%, Annual actual interest rate - 10.46-18.37% Loan repayments – monthly at installment Security – funds Loan commission fee – No fee Calculation of interest amount – daily, against the reducible loan balance. Learn more: About possible additional payments: Loan Tariffs . Previous Terms of Loan Tariffs The loan can be finalized either through acba digital or in-branch by presenting a valid identification document. Consumer loans, secured with a deposit are issued to individuals, being the customers of the Bank, for the consumption purpose, by the pledge of the funds available on their accounts; Loan amount is provided non-cash; The loan is provided or rejected taking into account the amount of funds available on the customer's accounts as a collateral; The loan is registered in the Bank's branches; During the agreement validity, the statements are provided via email every 30 days, if the customer does not select another option. YOU HAVE THE RIGHT TO COMMUNICATE WITH YOUR FINANCIAL ORGANIZATION IN YOUR PREFERRED METHOD - BY MAIL OR EMAIL. RECEIPT OF INFORMATION ELECTRONICALY IS THE MOST CONVENIENT. IT IS AVAILABLE 24/7, FREE OF THE RISK OF LOSS OF PAPER INFORMATION AND PROVIDES CONFIDENTIALITY. 24/7, FREE OF THE RISK OF LOSS OF PAPER INFORMATION AND PROVIDES CONFIDENTIALITY. The Bank may unilaterally change the contractual interest rate by notifying the Borrower at least 7 calendar days in advance, in case of non-purposeful use of the loan, as well as failure to fulfill the obligations stipulated by the loan agreement. ATTENTION: APPLYING FOR A LOAN, THE BANK WILL PROVIDE YOU, YOUR GUARANTORS (IF AVAILABLE) WITH AN INDIVIDUAL SHEET OF SIGNIFICANT TERMS OF CONSUMER LOAN, WHERE THE INDIVIDUAL TERMS OF LOAN, PROVIDED TO YOU, WILL BE PRESENTED. Confiscation of collateral THE PLEDGED PROPERTY CAN BE CONFISCATED, IF THE BORROWER DOES NOT DULY REPAY THE INTEREST AMOUNTS AND LOAN AMOUNT. IF THE COLLATERAL VALUE IS INSUFFICIENT, THE BORROWER’S LIABILITIES WILL BE REPAID AT THE EXPENSE OF OTHER PROPERTY OF THE BORROWER. Information, provided to the Credit Registry ATTENTION: IN CASE OF FAILURE TO FULFIL THE LIABILITIES OR IMPROPER PERFORMANCE OF LIABILITIES, THE CREDITOR SHALL SEND THESE DATA TO THE CREDIT BUREAU UPON 3 WORKING DAYS, WHERE YOUR CREDIT HISTORY IS REGISTERED. YOU HAVE THE RIGHT TO RECEIVE YOUR CREDIT HISTORY FROM THE CREDIT BUREAU FREE OF CHARGE ONCE IN A YEAR. ATTENTION: BAD CREDIT HISTORY CAN BE AN OBSTACLE FOR YOU TO RECEIVE A LOAN IN THE FUTURE. FOR GUARANTORS Please be informed that: If the borrower fails to perform their liabilities, you will pay for it instead, your credit history will be impaired, and your property will be confiscated. You will be provided with the copies of the loan agreement, guarantee agreement and repayment schedule. The communication will be performed in the way, preferred by you. You will be notified 7 days in advance of a change in the terms of the contract. A reminder of the current liability will be sent to you 1 day in advance. In case of delay of loan repayment, you will be notified at the latest one day later. THE GUARANTOR HAS THE RIGHT TO: Request from the creditor the information on the loan balance at any time. Receive the money, paid by you for the loan, from the borrower, as well as other losses incurred by you instead of the borrower.
